title: El Paso Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting El Paso with a Z-Score of +3.66. Temperatures are extremely high, causing severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in El Paso is causing temperatures to soar, with a Score of 10.0/10 indicating extreme heat.
The city is experiencing very low humidity at 8% and moderate wind speeds of 19.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat.
Cooling degree days (CDD) are at 11.8 GG, while heating degree days (HDD) are at 0.0 GG, highlighting the intense heat wave.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
